creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
fwiw, I had this exact same problem with Smokeping. On some of our servers  
it would be [perl], on others it would be "/usr/local/bin/perl  
/usr/local/bin/smokeping --logfile=/var/log/smokeping.log"

I'm still not sure what could possibly have been triggering the different  
behavior, but I did have to commit a workaround to the rc script.
